pi_items.source: task.json line 18, task description line 5, setup_task.sh line 19, export_result.sh line 12, README.md line 4
task.json line 19, task description mentions 'v=spf1 a mx ~all', README.md line 42 'Check DNS TXT records for v=spf1', verifier.py line 56 checks for 'v=spf1' in spf_record, RFC 7208 SPF standard

task.json line 20, task description line 6 'Enable DKIM signing', README.md lines 32-34 'DKIM is a global Virtualmin setting', verifier.py lines 67-75 checks dkim_enabled, setup_task.sh line 34 uses 'virtualmin set-dkim --disable' to reset state

task.json line 21, task description line 6 'Configure the Apache website for acmecorp.test to redirect HTTP to HTTPS', README.md line 34 'SSL redirect can be done via mod_rewrite rules, Apache Redirect directive, or Virtualmin option', verifier.py lines 78-83 checks ssl_redirect

task.json line 22, task description line 6 'set X-Content-Type-Options to nosniff', verifier.py line 86 checks nosniff_header, export_result.sh line 61 checks for 'X-Content-Type-Options.*nosniff', OWASP standard security header value

task.json line 23, task description line 6 'Disable the Apache directory listing (Options -Indexes)', README.md line 37 'Options -Indexes can be in the vhost config or .htaccess', verifier.py lines 94-99 checks indexes_disabled, export_result.sh lines 79-88 checks for -Indexes in Apache config

privileged_info_summary: The task 'harden_domain_security@1' configures security hardening for the domain 'acmecorp.test' in Virtualmin. Five independent security measures are verified: (1) SPF DNS record containing 'v=spf1' to prevent email spoofing, (2) DKIM signing enabled globally in Virtualmin for email authentication, (3) HTTP to HTTPS redirect configured in Apache, (4) X-Content-Type-Options header set to 'nosniff' to prevent MIME type sniffing, and (5) Apache directory listing disabled using the -Indexes option. All metadata values accurately match the task requirements and verifier implementation.
